headline: Inference efficiency dominates the window as NVIDIA collapses diffusion sampling from fifty steps to as few as one.
body: NVIDIA stacks dynamic quantization, latent chunk caching, and student-teacher distillation to reach ten to two hundred times speedup for near real-time video generation on Blackwell B200, pushing quantization, distillation, and prompt caching to the front. Multi-agent systems run as the broad theme of the day, spanning Google Cloud's ADK and A2A game-building demo, IBM's Kagenti identity-based security layer, and Tencent WorkBuddy's desktop agent. Robotics surfaces through Catie Cuan's argument that a ChatGPT moment is coming while humanoid robots should not be the sole design vision, and Satya Nadella's Loopcraft essay foregrounds ecosystem effects. Anthropic also faces a lawsuit over alleged false advertising on Claude Max subscription limits.
